titleStmt.title: SII 23.152: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 152. (A.R. No. 152 of 1907.) Malaikkōyil, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District At the entrance into the (rock-cut) cave, right side Jaṭ. Kulaśēkhara: year 3: 1192-93 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the introduction Pūvinkiḻatti etc. It records the remission of the taxes kaḍamai, vari and antarāyam on a dēvadāna land at Pāṇikuḍimaṅgalam, belonging to the temple of Śrivaram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār at Kalvāyil (Melaikkōyil) in Kāna-nāḍu, a subdivision of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu, by order of the chief Kalvāyil-Nāḍāḻvāṉ. The wording is faulty.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūviṉkiḻatti meyviṟṟi
ruppa metinilmātu naniyum punara
mayatapormaṭaṇtai ceyaṟpuyatti
ruppa mākkaḷai maṭantai vākki(ni)
nil viḷaṅka tikkiruṉāṅkunvicai
nilaveṟippa manuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟu na
ṟaicamaiyaṅkaḷ Āṟunt taḻaippa kā
nal veṅkai viḷluṭan nuṭaṉtu nin
navar Aṅkaḷar kācaḷataṉitai viṟṟiru
ppa ṉanakikicueḻaṭal Eḻupoḻi ve
ṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa ceṅkol naṭappa koṭu
ṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilan toḻippa
yar cempiyar villavar Āṭalu pallavar
tiṟai U(ṟa)ṭaṉ muṟai muṟai yiḻiya Irune
mi(na)āḷavum Oru neṟi Oṅka Innamut(ā)ki
ya Iyalicai nāṭakam manni va(ḷ)ḷara maṇi A
ṇivirasimhāsanattu vitaṟiteruḻiya kocca
ṭaiyapaṟmarāna tribhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ
tiripuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ sirikulaicekarate
vaṟkku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu kānanāṭaāna viruta
rājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu kānanāṭṭu tiru
veran kalvaāyil kānanāṭṭu śrīvaramuṭaiya
nāyannaār tevatāṉam pāṇikuṭimaṅkala
Ūrāṉa tevatāṉam paḷḷa nilattil ka
ṭamaiyum variyum Antarāyam ve
ṇṭu mutal tavittom cantiraāti
ttavakal celvatāka ceytu kuṭu
tteṉ kalveṭṭi kuṭutte
ṉ kalvāyil nāṭāḻ(ā)vāneṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
